Viewed Investigația Recorder „Raiul evazioniștilor” a forțat Guvernul să schimbe legea și să închidă portițele prin care firmele cu datorii sunt cesionate către persoane vulnerabile care nu mai pot fi trase la răspundere.

🔴 În materialul de presă pe care l-am publicat în urmă cu două săptămâni (https://bit.ly/4bqUy40), am prezentat pe larg acest fenomen, iar jurnaliștii Recorder i-au pus în față ministrului de Finanțe dovada că statul este păcălit în continuare, deși la finalul anului trecut se făcuseră modificări legislative care urmăreau combaterea acestor practici. Investigația Recorder a mai arătat că, prin specularea unor astfel de portițe, statul a fost prejudiciat în ultimii ani cu sute de milioane de euro.

Astăzi, printr-o Ordonanță de urgență adoptată la propunerea Ministerului Finanțelor, s-a stabilit că transferul părților sociale dintr-o societate cu datorii nu mai poate fi realizat fără ca ANAF să fie notificată, inclusiv atunci când cel care iese din firmă este un acționar minoritar. Este fix portița pe care am semnalat-o în investigație, arătând că patronii care voiau să scape de datorii se foloseau de faptul că ANAF era notificată doar atunci când cel care ieșea din firmă era acționar majoritar. Astfel, transferul era făcut în doi pași: se coopta în firmă o persoană paravan, care devenea acționar majoritar, iar patronul inițial ieșea ulterior din acte din postura de acționar minoritar evitând ca ANAF să fie notificată.

🔴 Este a doua oară, în ultimele luni, când o investigație Recorder provoacă modificări legislative, după ce în noiembrie 2025 a fost adoptată și legea Nordis, menită să-i protejeze pe cumpărători de țepele imobiliare.

Aceste investigații n-ar fi, însă, posibile fără susținerea publicului, iar una dintre cele mai importante surse de finanțare ale redacției Recorder o reprezintă formularul 230, prin care orice angajat poate redirecționa 3,5% din impozitul pe venit către asociația noastră. Durează mai puțin de un minut și nu vă costă nimic. Puteți completa formularul aici: https://recorder.ro/doneaza-35/?utm_source=UpdateRaiulEvazOUG5martie&utm_medium=YouTubeCommunityRecorder

Viewed On Tuesday, President Donald Trump’s Justice Department attempted to secure an indictment against six Democratic lawmakers for the crime of exercising their First Amendment rights.

Specifically, the Democrats — including Sens. Mark Kelly and Elissa Slotkin — released a video last fall in which they warned those serving in America’s military and intelligence agencies that “threats to our Constitution aren’t just coming from abroad, but from right here at home.”

The lawmakers, all former soldiers or intelligence operatives themselves, reminded their counterparts that they “must refuse illegal orders.” They did not explicitly question the legality of any specific military operation.

In this administration, it seems, the Justice Department’s first loyalty is to the president’s whims rather than America’s laws. So, it was shocking but unsurprising that the US attorney’s office in Washington actually tried to indict the so-called seditious six this week.

Yet it was also remarkable that the DOJ failed.

Viewed If this Haaretz poll is accurate, it means Israel has become the Serbia of the Middle East. 82% of your entire population supporting an ethnic cleansing is absolutely insane.

As far as I can see, Israel is a country built on tragically obsolete foundations. One of the main ideas behind its formation was to give Jewish people a home, where they'll be safe from persecution. The trouble is, they did it completely wrong: they've put Israel in the wrong place.

Ethnic nationalism can take you to dangerous places, up to and including Nazism. The end goal of ethnic nationalism is to only have one ethnicity within your borders. Or, if that isn't feasible, then have the """correct""" ethnicity dominate the country on all levels. Israel fell victim to ethnic nationalism by way of incorrect placement.

Ethnic nationalism and far-right sentiment feeds on ideas of past greatness and glory. It always has to fight for and against something. Usually those things are imaginary, which limits their popularity. However, if you place a population in their so-called ancestral homeland, in large parts of which different ethnicities reside, far-right ethnic nationalists get both of the things they want:
- a fight to reclaim their ancestral homeland, which is theirs by right of blood, and
- a fight against the invaders who defile their ancestral homeland through their very presence, and would ruin everything they, the "rightful" owners built

This is textbook ethnic nationalism, neatly summarized by Hitler and co. as "Blut und Erde", meaning "blood and soil": the unification of land and the ethnicity it "rightfully" belongs to. This is an early 20th century idea, upon which a 21st century Israel is attempting to exist. And it's going rather poorly. As in: "tens of thousands of corpses and an entire population in murder psychosis" poorly.

I believe this could have been avoided if Israel was simply founded somewhere else. I'm daydreaming here, but the people in charge should have bought a coastal area of 20 thousand square kilometers off a Sub-Saharan country. A large, empty, undeveloped area in exchange for a massive pile of cash. You now have your new Israel, free from all the religious and ethnic-nationalist baggage, ready to peacefully coexist in the world under the Western military umbrella. I admit this does sound a bit silly, but crazier things had been done around the time of World War 2.

EDIT: I should clarify, the above option is valid if we absolutely insist on the need for an Israel to exist in the first place. I think the intention behind the foundation of Israel is fundamentally flawed: "here, have your own country you can go to, in case we decide to do a second Holocaust". Instead, I'd have preferred something like: "hey, there is no need for your own place, because we’re through with ethnostates, we will learn to coexist instead".

Since none of the above happened, I believe Israel is stuck in a terminal death spiral into ethnic nationalism and authoritarianism. When (not if) they go ahead with the ethnic cleansing of their "ancestral homeland", all that far-right momentum will then turn inward, as it always does. When the government is done with the Arabs, the Israeli LGBT community will be next, then progressives, then liberals, then anyone else who disagrees. I hope this won't be the case, but I'm not seeing any indicators to the contrary.

Viewed Immune cells like to play hide and seek, and they usually win!

When a virus infects your cells, it will often try to use their internal mechanisms to replicate inside of them. After they notice that they have been infected, they release hundreds of thousands of proteins called interferons, whose task is to interfere with viruses. One of the ways they do that is by telling your cells to become super transparent. Generally, in order for a cell to become "transparent", it creates display windows into its insides, called MHC class I molecules. Cells constantly produce substances to stay alive, and to showcase to your immune cells what is going on inside them, they take random samples of their products and put them into these tiny display windows to give a peek inside. Interferons make a cell super transparent by telling it to make WAY more display windows. If a cell is infected and forced to make virus parts, your immune cells will dock at the MHC molecules and recognize the "hostile fragment" as hostile. They then send small vesicles  called lysosomes with toxic proteins into the infected cell. Finally, those toxic proteins will puncture the membrane and cause the cell and the viruses inside it to die.
